title: A Reproducible Audit of Data Leakage, Feature Stability, and Transportability in Transcriptomic Biomarker Classification
description: A reproducible audit case study of data leakage, feature-selection stability, and external-cohort transportability in transcriptomic biomarker classification, using a leakage-aware SMO-trained linear SVM workflow on public breast-cancer neoadjuvant-chemotherapy cohorts (pCR vs. residual disease). Cohorts: GSE25055 (discovery/internal validation), GSE25065 (same-platform same-study-family validation), and GSE41998 (predeclared cross-platform transportability sensitivity). Version v10.2 (final consistency QA).

creators.name: Yang, Iris
creators.affiliation: California State University, Los Angeles, USA; Purdue University, USA
